regional_cost_note: Commercial cleaners in Invercargill typically charge $32–$58/hr for office cleaning, $2–$6/m² for construction cleans, and $3–$9/m² for high-pressure washing. Southland rates are typically 10–15% below the national average, though remote work may attract travel charges. Confirm whether cleaning products, equipment, and waste disposal are included in the quoted rate.
